{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20745_1
|class_id=20745
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20745_2
|fame=13
|art=14
|fth=33
|civ=15
|tech=15
|ss1=Earth RES +4<br>Per Fissure Incident completed, Snail HP +10<br>Fissure Incidents Completed: 60/60
|ss2=Earth RES +8<br>Per Fissure Incident completed, Snail HP +15<br>Fissure Incidents Completed: 60/60
|ss3=Earth RES +12<br>Per Fissure Incident completed, Snail HP +20<br>Fissure Incidents Completed: 60/60
|ss4=Earth RES +12<br>Per Fissure Incident completed, Snail HP +20<br>Fissure Incidents Completed: 60/60
|ss7=Earth RES +12<br>Per Fissure Incident completed, Snail HP +20<br>Fissure Incidents Completed: 60/60<br> (Awakened)
}}
